name: KEEP LOOKING
short_description: This is a nerve-wracking horror game that puts you in a dark, claustrophobic cave with a relentless creature. Survive by flashing your dying flashlight at the right moments, too soon or too late, and it’s over. You must keep an eye on the creature, but beware: staring too long is just as deadly.
detailed_description:
KEEP LOOKING is a nerve-wracking horror game that puts you in a dark, claustrophobic cave with a relentless creature. Survive by flashing your dying flashlight at the right moments, too soon or too late, and it’s over. You must keep an eye on the creature, but beware: staring too long is just as deadly.

You are face-to-face with a creature that only moves when you can't see it. Occasionally, the light will fail, and you'll need to time your flashlight flash perfectly. Just remember: KEEP LOOKING, or it might get you. Try to survive until the timer runs out, and don't get tricked by the creature.
about_the_game:
KEEP LOOKING is a nerve-wracking horror game that puts you in a dark, claustrophobic cave with a relentless creature. Survive by flashing your dying flashlight at the right moments, too soon or too late, and it’s over. You must keep an eye on the creature, but beware: staring too long is just as deadly.

You are face-to-face with a creature that only moves when you can't see it. Occasionally, the light will fail, and you'll need to time your flashlight flash perfectly. Just remember: KEEP LOOKING, or it might get you. Try to survive until the timer runs out, and don't get tricked by the creature.
